html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge

LockedUnlocked

The Safe is a structure exclusive to The Gorge event. It functions similarly to a Chest, providing 9 inventory slots for item storage. The main difference is that there are locked safes, which needs to be opened with a Key.

There are four safes on the map: 1 unlocked safe and 3 locked safes. The unlocked one is located near the starting area, for more convenient storage of ingredients and livestock. The locked safes can be found in the area of the destroyed city near the Salt Ponds. Two of them are marked with signs, while the third is hidden behind a Broken Carriage on the way to the Mealing Stone.

Locked safes contain silver dishes and large kitchen utensils. These items are valuable for preparing higher-quality meals and earning greater rewards, encouraging players to unlock the safes.

The items of the three locked safes are divided into three fixed item sets, though which safe contains each set is randomized every game.

Item sets in Safes

  • First safe: x2
  • Second safe: x2
  • Third safe: x3

Trivia

  • The Safe is later added in game as one of the skin of Ice Box.

Gallery

  • Safe unlocking animation.
  • Safe Profile Icon.
  • Unused map icon.
  • Safes in the game.
  • Safe behind Broken Carriage.

“It's a safe. For keeping things safe.”

The '''Safe''' is a structure exclusive to [[The Gorge]] event. It functions similarly to a [[Chest]], providing 9 inventory slots for item storage. The main difference is that there are locked safes, which needs to be opened with a [[Key]].

There are four safes on the map: 1 unlocked safe and 3 locked safes. The unlocked one is located near the starting area, for more convenient storage of ingredients and livestock. The locked safes can be found in the area of the destroyed city near the [[Salt Pond]]s. Two of them are marked with signs, while the third is hidden behind a Broken Carriage on the way to the [[Mealing Stone]].

Locked safes contain [[Serving|silver dishes]] and large kitchen utensils. These items are valuable for preparing higher-quality meals and earning greater rewards, encouraging players to unlock the safes.

The items of the three locked safes are divided into three fixed item sets, though which safe contains each set is randomized every game.

==Item sets in Safes==
* '''First safe:''' [[File:Silver Plate.png|link=Serving]]x2 [[File:Large Casserole Dish.png|link=Large Casserole Dish]] [[File:Silver Bowl.png|link=Serving]]
* '''Second safe:''' [[File:Silver Plate.png|link=Serving]] [[File:Large Cookpot.png|link=Large Cookpot]] [[File:Silver Bowl.png|link=Serving]]x2
* '''Third safe:'''  [[File:Silver Plate.png|link=Serving]] [[File:Silver Bowl.png|link=Serving]] [[File:Syrup Pot.png|link=Syrup Pot]] [[File:Tree Tapping Kit.png|link=Tree Tapping Kit]]x3

== {{Trivia}} Trivia ==
* The Safe is later added in game as one of the [[Belongings|skin]] of [[Ice Box/DST|Ice Box]].
